mapper.sql: SELECT a.id, a.article_type, a.slug, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_path, a.content_path, a.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.slug AS category_slug, a.publish_date, a.read_time, a.featured, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM articles a LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = a.category_id
mapper.select: ORDER BY a.publish_date DESC, a.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles a LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = a.category_id
WHERE a.article_type = #{articleType} ORDER BY a.publish_date DESC, a.id DESC
ORDER BY a.publish_date DESC, a.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles (article_type, slug, title, summary, cover_path, content_path, category_id, publish_date, read_time, featured) VALUES (#{articleType}, #{slug}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{coverPath}, #{contentPath}, #{categoryId}, #{publishDate}, #{readTime}, #{featured})
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_path = #{coverPath}, content_path = #{contentPath}, category_id = #{categoryId}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, read_time = #{readTime}, featured = #{featured} WHERE slug = #{slug} AND article_type = #{articleType}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM articles WHERE slug = #{slug} AND article_type = #{articleType}
mapper.select: SELECT t.name FROM tags t JOIN article_tags at ON at.tag_id = t.id WHERE at.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY t.name
